mapper.insert: INSERT INTO session_memory( id, session_id, compact_summary, session_summary, summarized_through_message_id, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{sessionId}, #{compactSummary}, #{sessionSummary}, #{summarizedThroughMessageId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ) ON CONFLICT (session_id) DO UPDATE SET compact_summary = EXCLUDED.compact_summary, session_summary = EXCLUDED.session_summary, summarized_through_message_id = EXCLUDED.summarized_through_message_id, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
